consensus_flo+owl.description: Florence-2-base + OWLv2 consensus (min 2 votes, IoU>0.3), YOLO old-species labels, lr=0.001, 50 epochs, replay=30%

florence_only_lowlr.description: Florence-2-base only (min 1 vote), YOLO old-species labels, lr=0.0005, 50 epochs, replay=50%

3model_2vote.description: Florence-2-base + OWLv2 + InternVL2 (min 2 votes), lr=0.001, 50 epochs, replay=30%

7model_3vote.description: All 7 VLMs (min 3 votes), lr=0.001, 50 epochs, replay=30%

consensus_frozen.description: Florence-2-base + OWLv2 consensus, frozen backbone (10 layers), lr=0.005, 50 epochs, replay=30%

conclusion: 2-model consensus (Florence-2 high precision + OWLv2 high recall) achieves first precision improvement on unseen species (+0.016 F1) with minimal forgetting (-0.020). More models voting is worse, not better. Quality > quantity for pseudo-label consensus.
